site.tagline: Straightforward storage. No gimmicks. No surprise rate hikes.
site.description: Brand-new climate-controlled self storage with 24/7 gated access in Clarence Center and Buffalo, NY. Published prices that stay published — no surprise rate hikes.

hours.officeDetail: Our office isn't staffed full-time. Call or email ahead and we'll meet you on site.
hours.gateDetail: Once you're a customer, you can reach your unit any hour of any day, including weekends and holidays.

promo.headline: First month 50% off
promo.details: Take half off your first month's rent when you commit to a 4-month minimum stay. One offer per customer. Available at both Epic Storage locations while the promotion lasts — see terms.
